charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1101_0100:
Sabi invited [Name:PlayerNickname ] out
and led [EN:Gen Ref="255" M="him" F="her" ] on a chase.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1101_0200:
After a long, dramatic pursuit,
[Name:PlayerNickname ] caught up
to Sabi.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_0400:
You came all the way out to this cold place!
I’m amazed you caught up to me.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_0500:
But the real question here is...did I really
have fun playing with you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_0402_1000:
Well, I got caught, so we’re done playing.
That’s no fun!
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_1400: Doesn’t my Rhyperior look really strong?
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_1500:
I’ve been battling alongside her since I was
in Hisui.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_1600:
She battled together with my Magmortar and
Electivire!
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_1700:
The three of them are why I’m OK being
around scary Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_1900:
Since coming to Pasio, I’ve tried copying
Adaman by putting Pokémon in Poké Balls.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_2000:
He taught me that’s how people and
Pokémon coexist on Pasio.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_2100:
It was kinda strange at first, but I’m already
used to it.
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_2200:
After all, even if how we coexist changes,
I know Rhyperior’s still my trusty partner!
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_2400:
Looks like Rhyperior’s eager to play
with you!
charaepi_ch0315_00_wasabi/2301_1201_2500:
All right! Now that you’ve caught me,
let’s have a fun Pokémon battle!
